subject: [COMMON] Lower limit requirements for mariadb
commit_message:
[COMMON] Lower limit requirements for mariadb

requests/limits for "small" deployments are too big compared to actual
usage.

Issue-ID: OOM-2230
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I2e3f6dae57714ddc85d2fc04a3793fe034ccc8ef
